data.title: Bitcoin dropped below $70,000, hinting at a $74,000 relief rally and not a major trend shift.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped below $70,000 on Friday, prompting analysts to believe that the recent increase to $74,000 was merely a temporary rebound rather than a sustained shift in trend.

data.title: Mangoceuticals, Inc. Announces PCT Patent Filing for MGX-0024 Antiviral Technology to Include Inhibiting Respiratory or Orally Acquired Virus Infection in Animals or Birds
data.description: A Dallas-based company called Mangoceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MGRX), known for its health and wellness products sold through telemedicine platforms MangoRx and PeachesRx, along with partner IntraMont Technologies, Inc., recently filed a Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) international application (P-641039-PC) on February 26, 2026. This application aims to provide widespread global patent protection for their antiviral technology used in animal feed and drinking water additives for MGX-0024.

data.title: Blue Moon Provides Update on Financing and Engagement of Outside the Box Capital
data.description: Blue Moon Metals Inc. has shared positive news regarding its recent financing activities. The company, listed on both TSXV and NASDAQ under the symbols MOON and BMM respectively, issued a news release on March 3, 2026, discussing a financing agreement with Leonhard Nilsen & Sønner AS. This agreement is a significant move for Blue Moon, indicating progress and potential growth in its operations.
Harvard Bioscience reports a reverse stock split.

data.title: Lantheus Announces FDA Approval of PYLARIFY TruVu™ (piflufolastat F 18) Injection
data.description: A new version of the popular PSMA PET imaging agent in the U.S. market has been developed. This updated formulation merges the diagnostic abilities of PYLARIFY ® (piflufolastat F 18) with the potential for larger production batches. This change is expected to enhance patient access to the imaging agent and improve diagnostic capabilities across a wider population.

data.title: Hooker Furnishings Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Hooker Furnishings Corporation, traded on Nasdaq-GS as HOFT, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.115 per share. The dividend will be payable on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 16, 2026.

data.title: Powell Industries Announces Three-For-One Stock Split
data.description: Houston-based Powell Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: POWL) recently announced a three-for-one forward stock split of its common stock. The Board of Directors approved the split along with an increase in authorized shares to facilitate it. Shareholders of record on March 20, 2026, will receive two additional shares for each share held on that date, distributed post-market close on April 2, 2026. Pending Nasdaq approval, trading on a split-adjusted basis is set to commence on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Intellia Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On March 1, 2026, Intellia Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Cambridge, Massachusetts, made significant news by awarding inducement grants to six newly hired employees under the 2024 Inducement Plan. Leveraging CRISPR gene editing and other cutting-edge technologies, Intellia is at the forefront of revolutionizing medicine. Traded on the Nasdaq under the symbol NTLA, the company is dedicated to attracting top talent through attractive inducements, marking a strategic move to enhance its workforce and drive innovation.

data.title: NewAmsterdam Pharma Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V., based in Naarden, the Netherlands, and Miami, announced that it has granted inducement share options to two non-executive new hires. The Compensation Committee of the company's Board of Directors approved the grant of these options, which cover a total of 10,000 ordinary shares of NewAmsterdam. This decision was made under the 2024 Inducement Plan, with the aim of attracting these employees to join the company. NewAmsterdam is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on developing oral, non-statin medications for patients at risk of cardiovascular disease with elevated LDL-C levels when current treatments are not effective or well-tolerated. The options were granted in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Galapagos Creates New Subscription Right Plan
data.description: On March 6, 2026, at 22.01 CET in Mechelen, Belgium, Galapagos NV (listed on Euronext and NASDAQ under GLPG) disclosed that 1,750,000 subscription rights were established by its Board of Directors as part of a fresh subscription right program.

data.title: Saks Global Advances Store Portfolio Optimization to Solidify Position as the Premier Luxury Destination and Drive Sustainable Growth
data.description: Saks Fifth Avenue and Neiman Marcus are expanding their store presence by focusing on top-performing and sought-after locations in luxury customer markets. With over 500 brands resuming shipping, inventory flow has increased, releasing nearly $1.3 billion worth of products.
Panama Maritime Authority recommends that Panama-flagged ships avoid traffic in high-risk areas in the Persian Gulf.
